## CryptoUtils.KeyStore namespace

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[KeyStore](./ts-extras.cryptoutils.keystore.keystore.md)


</td><td>

Password-protected key store for managing encryption secrets.

The KeyStore provides a secure vault for storing named encryption keys. The vault is encrypted at rest using a master password via PBKDF2 key derivation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

## Functions

<table><thead><tr><th>

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[isKeyStoreFile(json)](./ts-extras.cryptoutils.keystore.iskeystorefile.md)


</td><td>

Checks if a JSON object appears to be a key store file. Uses the format field as a discriminator.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

[DEFAULT\_KEYSTORE\_ITERATIONS](./ts-extras.cryptoutils.keystore.default_keystore_iterations.md)


</td><td>
